# Elsner Solexa 230V handset/sensor
# {N}<hex>
#
# Source: https://github.com/merbanan/rtl_433/issues/2798
#
# The first 60 are known-good messages recovered from the issue's elsner.zip
# captures (rauar's 2024-01-20 comment), decoded with `-Y minmax -R 364:vv`.
# The remaining 38 are additional CRC-valid messages from a later BitBench
# comment in the same issue, from a second, unlabeled population (see the
# `family1` note in elsner_solexa.c) -- prefixed here with the anchor byte
# 0x0a since they were not captured as a demodulated burst.
#
# CRC-16 (poly 0x1021, init 0x68b3) validates on all 98. The decoder's
# reported `data` is the payload after removing a self-synchronizing
# transform G(x) = x^7 + x^5 + 1 (see elsner_solexa.c), which is why every
# resulting frame shares the marker 0xc945a400 before the payload; `rolling`
# and `counter` are recovered from the raw on-air bytes and validate on all
# 98. `command` is reported only for the first 60 (see elsner_solexa.c for
# the token derivation); annotations for those are the button/label of each
# capture's directory.

# automode
# g001_868.25M_1000k.cu8
{314}02b3ab64ee999da15e0c1826731274e9d97402cdafab62916ea95e895ec9dfcba312302c64fa1e0
# g001_868.25M_1000k.cu8
{314}02b3ab64eeb351092debd7e632d1f3e7952bb1efab2207047014343434343474f5f7fb8352b654c
# g002_868.25M_1000k.cu8
{314}02b3ab64eea6b715461c38267312346896eef87585977a814ea95e895e891e489d46d9ff8b3b9c4

# unlabeled (family1=0), from the issue's later BitBench comment; no button
# label available, and this decoder does not report a command for family1=0
# (see elsner_solexa.c); rolling/counter still validate on all of them.
{312}0acead93bab980e9176fdfd6ab47ce9c11a381c2620cc2413d80b3b2b28cbed5dae4f92275e71b
